rows.summary: No substantive change in Item 7 between the 2023 and 2024 FDDs. All cost ranges, explanatory notes, and structural elements (including Franchise Agreement and Multi-Unit Development Agreement tables) are identical in content and formatting. Minor OCR/typographic differences (e.g., 'table' vs 'chart' in Note 4; period added after 'See, Table A.' in NEW) are non-substantive.

The total estimated initial investment range for Conversion Franchises decreased slightly from $89,805–$257,232 (2017) to $89,805–$254,112 (2018), a $3,120 reduction in the upper bound. The change stems entirely from a $3,120 decrease in the 'TOTALS' line; all individual line-item ranges (e.g., 'Updating Trucks', 'Signage for Trucks', 'Additional Funds') remain identical between years. No new line items were added, none were removed, and no textual descriptions of obligations, methods of payment, or timing changed meaningfully. The only substantive variation is the updated year stamp ('(02/24/18)') and minor formatting adjustments (e.g., page headers).
